subject: Re: Prefabricated Homes
body:
ok,, and have carlos look for boats

----- Original Message ----
From: john amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
To: "jeeproject@yahoo.com" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Cc: Bill Rowles <w_rowles@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, July 23, 2007 6:39:30 AM
Subject: Prefabricated Homes


We developed a few more leads over the weekend and think that a trip tommorrow could be more productive than today partly because this morning itoccurred to Bill and me that having someone with us who speaks spanish would make all the difference in the world. Would it be possible to have Carlos accompany Bill on this trip? Bill could handle the technical side and Carlos is a gold mine of information. I am not sure where you are. I will call out to the island in case you are there to find out whether this suggestion is ok.
body_html:
ok,, and have carlos look for boats
